falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern assumption.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index surges above 30 (a 25% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would contradict the 'UNKNOWN' verdict, proving the model's failure to anticipate a blowoff phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: A confirmed bullish engulfing candlestick pattern forms on the Nasdaq-100 with volume >2x the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear technical reversal signal would falsify the 'HOLD' stance, demonstrating a definitive trend shift unaccounted for by the current pattern match.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
